---
title: "Jinrui (Jerry) Zhang"
subtitle: "Data Analyst · Business Intelligence · Machine Learning"
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---

Welcome to my data portfolio. I'm a graduate student in Business Analytics at UC Irvine with experience in machine learning, statistical modeling, and business intelligence. Browse my projects below.
